name: agent-configs
description: Scarb's agent skills library: feature design docs, project documentation generation, source-code visualization, and intranet browsing.

interface.shortDescription: Feature design, documentation, and code-analysis skills for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use Agent Configs to create implementation-ready feature design documents, generate project documentation from source code, visualize source code as PlantUML activity diagrams, and browse intranet pages reliably.
defaultPrompt: Design a new feature for this project.
